command_line: gdal vector pipeline read --open-option ENCODING=UTF-8 --open-option ADJUST_GEOM_TYPE=FIRST_SHAPE --open-option AUTO_REPACK=YES --open-option DBF_EOF_CHAR=YES --input /vsizip//vsicurl/https://www2.census.gov/geo/tiger/TIGER2025/STATE/tl_2025_us_state.zip/tl_2025_us_state.shp --input-layer tl_2025_us_state ! filter --where "STATEFP NOT IN ('02','15','60','66','69','72','74','78')" ! sql --sql "SELECT GEOID AS geoid, STATEFP AS state_fips, STUSPS AS state_abbr, NAME AS state_name, ALAND AS area_land_m2, AWATER AS area_water_m2 FROM \"tl_2025_us_state\"" ! make-valid ! set-geom-type --multi --skip ! reproject --output-crs EPSG:4326 ! sort --method hilbert
